Class Employee

java.lang.Object
HumanResources.Employee
All Implemented Interfaces:
DetailsDisplayable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Contractor, FullTimeEmployee, PartTimeEmployee
public abstract class Employee extends Object implements DetailsDisplayable
Abstract base class representing a generic employee in the HR system.

All employee types share a common identity: an employee ID, a name, and a department assignment. Subclasses must implement displayInfo() to render their type-specific details and calculatePay() to compute their monthly compensation.

This class implements DetailsDisplayable to enforce a consistent display contract across all employee types.

See Also:
  • FullTimeEmployee
  • PartTimeEmployee
  • Contractor

  • Constructor Details

    • Employee

      public Employee(String employeeID, String name, String department)
      Constructs a new Employee with the specified identity information.
      Parameters:
      employeeID - the unique identifier for this employee (e.g., "E001")
      name - the full name of the employee
      department - the department to which this employee belongs

  • Method Details

    • getEmployeeID

      public String getEmployeeID()
      Returns the unique employee ID.
      Returns:
      the employee ID string

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the employee's full name.
      Returns:
      the employee's name

    • getDepartment

      public String getDepartment()
      Returns the department this employee belongs to.
      Returns:
      the department name

    • setEmployeeID

      public void setEmployeeID(String employeeID)
      Sets the employee's ID.
      Parameters:
      employeeID - the new employee ID; should be non-null and non-empty

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the employee's full name.
      Parameters:
      name - the new name; should be non-null and non-empty

    • setDepartment

      public void setDepartment(String department)
      Sets the department for this employee.
      Parameters:
      department - the new department name; should be non-null and non-empty

    • displayInfo

      public abstract void displayInfo()
      Displays detailed information about this employee to standard output.

      Each subclass formats its own output to include type-specific fields (e.g., salary for full-time, hourly rate for part-time and contractors).

      Specified by:
      displayInfo in interface DetailsDisplayable

    • calculatePay

      public abstract double calculatePay()
      Calculates and returns the employee's estimated monthly pay.

      The calculation formula varies by subclass:

      • FullTimeEmployee: annualSalary / 12
      • PartTimeEmployee: hourlyRate * maxHoursPerWeek * 4
      • Contractor: returns the base hourlyRate — callers must multiply by hours worked for actual pay
      Returns:
      the estimated monthly compensation as a double
